title: Reno Direct & Service Requests Report – February 2026
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 23, 2026
TO: Honorable Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Cynthia Esparza, Director
Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
DEPT: Community Engagement and Services
SUBJECT: Reno Direct & Service Requests Report – February 2026
Monthly reports provide insights into how constituents engage with the City through Reno Direct, the City's centralized customer service center and ServiceNow platform.
Key report highlights include:
• Number of Reno Direct constituent interactions (calls, voicemails, emails, online chats)
• Number of service requests submitted citywide
• Number of service requests closed citywide
• Top five trending service request types citywide
• Top five trending service request types by ward
This information supports efforts to enhance service delivery while addressing community needs in a responsive and equitable manner.

Attachments:
• February 2026 Service Request Trends & Interaction Report

fields.authors: Cynthia Esparza, Director; Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
fields.tldr: This memo presents the February 2026 monthly report on constituent interactions with Reno Direct and citywide service requests tracked through the ServiceNow platform. Reno Direct handled 2,547 total interactions, while 2,506 new service requests were submitted and 2,619 were closed across all departments. Illegal/abandoned parking was the top service request type citywide and in every individual ward. The report is intended to support equitable and responsive service delivery across the community.
fields.key_stats: Total Reno Direct interactions: 2,547 (1,841 calls answered, 282 voicemails, 418 emails, 6 online chats); New service requests citywide: 2,506; Closed service requests citywide: 2,619; Top citywide request: Parking Illegally/Abandoned (751); Top departments by new requests: Reno Police & Parking Enforcement (1,039), Business Licensing (403), Code Enforcement (293).

people: Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
